title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Savills India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Savills India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Savills India:
Savills India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Savills India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
